name: boilerplate-nextjs-express
description: Production-ready Next.js + Express TypeScript boilerplate (choose Postgres, MongoDB, or Supabase)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter server-sql build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.build:mongo: pnpm --filter server-mongo build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server-sql test && pnpm --filter client test
scripts.test:mongo: pnpm --filter server-mongo test && pnpm --filter client test
scripts.test:api:ci: concurrently --kill-others --success first "pnpm --filter server-sql dev" "sleep 8 && pnpm test:api:sql"
scripts.test:api:ci:mongo: concurrently --kill-others --success first "pnpm --filter server-mongo dev" "sleep 8 && pnpm test:api:mongo"
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && pnpm test:api:ci && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter server-sql lint && pnpm --filter client lint
scripts.lint:mongo: pnpm --filter server-mongo lint && pnpm --filter client lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter server-sql format && pnpm --filter client format
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter server-sql exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter client type-check
scripts.type-check:mongo: pnpm --filter server-mongo exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter client type-check
scripts.build:supabase: pnpm --filter server-supabase build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.test:supabase: pnpm --filter server-supabase test && pnpm --filter client test
scripts.test:api:ci:supabase: concurrently --kill-others --success first "pnpm --filter server-supabase dev" "sleep 8 && pnpm test:api:supabase"
scripts.lint:supabase: pnpm --filter server-supabase lint && pnpm --filter client lint
scripts.type-check:supabase: pnpm --filter server-supabase exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter client type-check
scripts.db:up:supabase: docker compose -f server-supabase/docker-compose.yml up -d && (cd server-supabase && supabase start)
scripts.db:down:supabase: (cd server-supabase && supabase stop) ; docker compose -f server-supabase/docker-compose.yml down
